# 📡 ECHO FORGE RADAR: THE INSTITUTIONAL EDGE

Most traders react to price moves after they happen.

Professionals see the accumulation *before* the breakout.

Echo Forge Radar decodes real-time institutional intent—the same signals tier-1 desks use to position before retail even wakes up.

🔹 Zero repainting. Zero lag. Zero noise.
🔹 Track dark pool flows, gamma exposure, and sentiment divergence in real-time.
🔹 Built for the trader who refuses to chase—because by the time you see the move, the smart money already made it.

This isn't a screener. It's a coordinate system for alpha.

Available now on the SML Platform. 📡

Stop trading blind. Start trading informed.

🌐 scriptmasterlabs.com/radar

#AlgorithmicTrading #InstitutionalAlpha #EchoForge #TradingEdge #QuantTrading #MarketIntelligence #ScriptMasterLabs
